name: pdca-skill-creator
description: Create PDCA-based Codex skills with business-core-first execution, crawler scaffolds, conservative maturity grading, rule-driven checks, smoke tests, evidence, logs, health diagnosis, and iterative improvement.

interface.longDescription: Create Codex skills that follow a PDCA loop with Plan, Do, Check, and Act stages while preserving the business core first. It generates core implementation plans, crawler scaffolds for page inspection tasks, selector and field extraction matrices, conservative maturity grading, capability matrices, executable scaffolds, rule-driven checks, smoke tests, evidence, logs, health diagnosis, historical requirements, and iterative improvement.
defaultPrompt: Use $pdca-skill-creator to create a skill for a recurring workflow.
Use $pdca-skill-creator to upgrade an existing workflow skill.
Use $pdca-skill-creator to design a self-checking inspection skill.
